steps.title: Fastest path: try the choices
steps.content: Because the choices give possible solutions, plug them into the equation instead of solving from scratch. The only choice that satisfies the equation is A, $\frac{1}{3}$.

steps.title: Factor the denominator as a perfect square
Solve for x + 4
steps.content: Let u = x + 4. Then 1/u² = 9, so u² = 1/9, giving u = ±1/3.

steps.title: Identify the possible value
steps.content: x + 4 = 1/3 or x + 4 = -1/3. The value 1/3 appears among the choices.
